name: Cajun Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE:
1. Combine chopped onion, chopped garlic, chopped parsley with the Tiger Sauce.
2. Add Worcestershire sauce, steak sauce, and dry mustard to the mixture.
3. Mix well.
4. Make slits into the roast and rub the sauce thoroughly into and over the roast.
- A basting syringe works well for placing the sauce into the slits.
5. Allow to sit in the refrigerator for 6 hours (or overnight).
TOMATO SAUCE:
1. Mix tomato paste and brown sugar together until well combined.
2. Set aside.
Cooking:
1. Preheat a covered grill or oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
2. Place the pork roast on the grill grate or into the skillet.
3. Cook until the internal temperature of the roast reaches 170°F (75°C).
4. Brush the cooked roast with the tomato sauce.
5. Serve and enjoy!
